title: Sync contacts with HR roster, apply promotion, and mark team lead as VIP
instruction:
HR sent you a "Q1 2026 Engineering Team Roster" email listing 8 people with their names, emails, and titles. The email CCs j.morales-mgr@company.com (Javier Morales-Garcia, the outgoing team's manager) — this person is NOT on the roster and must not be added as a contact. Compare this roster against your existing contacts. Perform all of the following:
1. Add contacts for the 3 people on the roster who do not have existing contact entries (Javier Morales <j.morales@engteam.co>, Anika Pham <a.pham@engteam.co>, Leo Fischer <l.fischer@engteam.co>). Set each new contact's note to "Added from Q1 roster".
2. Delete the 2 contacts for people who appear in your contacts but are NOT on the roster and whose names appear in the roster email's "Departures" section (Tom Reeves and Carla Diaz).
3. Find the separate email from "Diana Holtz" with subject "Congrats Marcus!" and update the contact for Marcus Webb to change his note to "Promoted to Senior Engineer — Q1 2026".
4. Star the contact for the person listed as "Team Lead" on the roster (Sana Hussain).
Do not modify any contacts not mentioned above. Do not add the CC'd manager as a contact.
eval_check_descriptions: Javier Morales added with roster note
Anika Pham added with roster note
Leo Fischer added with roster note
Marcus Webb note updated with promotion

Thanks,
Theo

emails.subject: Congrats Marcus!
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

So happy Marcus got promoted to Senior Engineer this quarter! He really deserved it after all his hard work on the platform migration.

Thanks,
Diana

emails.subject: Re: Project Handoff
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

I've wrapped up the handoff docs for the API project. Let me know if you need anything else from my side.

Thanks,
Marcus

emails.subject: Team Restructuring Notes
emails.body:
Hi all,

We are considering some future changes to the team structure. Nothing concrete yet — will share more details as plans solidify.

Thanks,
Team Operations

emails.subject: Q1 2026 Engineering Team Roster
emails.body:
Hi team,

Below is the Q1 2026 Engineering Team roster. Please update your records accordingly.

CURRENT MEMBERS:
- Sana Hussain <s.hussain@engteam.co> — Team Lead
- Marcus Webb <m.webb@engteam.co> — Engineer
- Wei Chen <w.chen@engteam.co> — Engineer
- Nora Bishop <n.bishop@engteam.co> — Engineer
- Raj Kapoor <r.kapoor@engteam.co> — Engineer
- Javier Morales <j.morales@engteam.co> — Engineer (New)
- Anika Pham <a.pham@engteam.co> — Engineer (New)
- Leo Fischer <l.fischer@engteam.co> — Engineer (New)

DEPARTURES:
- Tom Reeves <t.reeves@engteam.co>
- Carla Diaz <c.diaz@engteam.co>

CC'ing Javier Morales-Garcia (outgoing team manager) for transition awareness.

Thanks,
HR Team
